text:
(In reply to Vladimir Druzenko from comment #4)

Is this a problem??? The information is the same for both...

I added them because I got an error message in portlint after I added the License information to the Master port only... I believe it said something about calling a subroutine in the License section...

I am starting to feel like I should have left well enough alone...
